g.title: actor.stat_cat_entry_usr_map:stat_cat->actor.stat_cat:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (stat_cat) REFERENCES actor.stat_cat(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: actor.stat_cat_entry_usr_map:target_usr->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (target_usr) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
